## Answer
Based on your academic progress and remaining requirements, here are some recommended courses for your next semester.

## Recommended Next Courses
*   BCOM 231 — Business Communication (3 credits)
*   CS 365 — Operating Systems (3 credits)
*   CS 379 — Programming Languages and Compilers (3 credits)
*   CS 458 — Advanced Programming in C# (3 credits)

## Suggested Schedule (12 credits)
**Spring 2027**
*   BCOM 231 — Business Communication (3 credits) - *Addresses Foundations - Composition/Speech or Embedded Experience - Writing*
*   CS 365 — Operating Systems (3 credits) - *Computer Science Major Requirement*
*   CS 379 — Programming Languages and Compilers (3 credits) - *Computer Science Major Requirement*
*   CS 458 — Advanced Programming in C# (3 credits) - *Computer Science Major Requirement*

## Notes
Please verify course availability for Spring 2027, as term data was not provided. This schedule helps you progress in your Computer Science major and addresses some outstanding Core 39 requirements. You will need to address additional Core 39 requirements in future semesters.
